signals.headline: Powell Confirms Tariffs Will Drive Higher Inflation and Slower Growth, Larger Than Expected | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Powell Confirms Tariffs Will Drive Higher Inflation and Slower Growth, Larger Than Expected | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell stated in a Chicago speech that President Trump's recently announced tariffs—higher than anticipated—will likely cause higher inflation (at least temporarily, possibly persistent) and slower growth, urging the Fed to anchor long-term inflation

Polymarket's most active markets as of April 21, 2026, focus on **Elon Musk tweet counts**, such as "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" and "Elon Musk # tweets in April 2026?", with the 1120-1159 range trading at 28% probability and $9M volume[1][3].
